# MaxLiving Chiropractic New Braunfels

## Business Information
- Name: MaxLiving Chiropractic New Braunfels
- Address: 741 Generations Dr Suite 200, New Braunfels, TX 78130
- Phone: (830) 255-4350
- Website: https://ml-chiro-newbraunfels.vercel.app
- Rating: 5.0 stars (67 Google reviews)
- Franchise: MaxLiving Health Center

## Doctors
- Dr. Rachel Diestel, D.C. -- Prenatal, Pediatric, Nutrition, Detoxification, Advanced Spinal Correction. Parker University. Pre- and peri-natal certified.
- Dr. Travis Diestel, D.C. -- Corrective Exercise, Military/First Responder Wellness, Spinal Correction, Level 2 Activator. Parker University. US Army veteran (5 years). Certified Personal Trainer.

## Staff
- Megan Word -- CA Tech & Certified Integrative Health Practitioner
- Amanda Wilson -- Patient Care Coordinator

## Services
- Chiropractic Adjustments / Advanced Spinal Correction
- Prenatal Chiropractic (Dr. Rachel)
- Pediatric Chiropractic (Dr. Rachel)
- Corrective Exercises (Dr. Travis)
- Massage Therapy
- Nutritional Coaching
- Detoxification

## Conditions Treated
- Back Pain
- Neck Pain
- Sciatica
- Headaches & Migraines
- Pregnancy-related pain
- Pediatric developmental concerns
- Veteran/military chronic pain

## The MaxLiving 5 Essentials
1. Core Chiropractic
2. Nutrition
3. Mindset
4. Oxygen & Exercise
5. Minimize Toxins

## Office Hours
- Monday: 7:45-10:30 AM, 3:00-6:00 PM
- Tuesday: 7:45-10:30 AM
- Wednesday: 7:45-10:30 AM, 3:00-6:00 PM
- Thursday: 7:45-10:30 AM, 3:00-6:00 PM
- Friday-Sunday: Closed

## Service Areas
New Braunfels, San Marcos, Seguin, Canyon Lake, Kyle, Wimberley

## New Patient Special
$49 -- Includes consultation, comprehensive exam, X-rays (if needed), and first adjustment.
CareCredit accepted. Most insurance welcome.

## About
Dr. Rachel and Dr. Travis Diestel are a husband-wife chiropractic team. Rachel's health transformation through chiropractic -- overcoming kidney and reproductive health issues -- inspired Travis to leave the U.S. Army after 5 years of service and pursue chiropractic. Both graduated from Parker University. They opened MaxLiving Chiropractic in New Braunfels in 2020.

## Contact
- Email: dr.rachel@maxlivingnewbraunfels.com
- Email: info@maxlivingnewbraunfels.com
